sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἀνοίγω

- Transliteration: Anoigo

- Phonetic: an-oy'-go

- Definition:

1. to open

- Origin: from G303 and oigo (to open)

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G303 and οἴγω oigō (to open); to open up (literally or figuratively in various applications): - open.
